# YESPYQ

> YESPYQ (https://yespyq.com) is a free web app for practising UPSC Civil Services Examination (IAS) **Prelims previous year questions (PYQs)**. It offers 2,100+ authentic UPSC CSE Prelims MCQs from past years, organised subject-wise and year-wise, each with the correct answer and a detailed explanation, plus a gamified one-question-at-a-time quiz mode. It is completely free with no login, and is not affiliated with UPSC.

## What YESPYQ is
- A previous-year-question (PYQ) practice platform for the UPSC Civil Services Examination (Prelims / General Studies Paper-I).
- Every question is a real UPSC CSE Prelims PYQ, tagged with its subject and exam year.
- Each question shows the correct answer and a detailed explanation (solution).
- Free, no sign-up, mobile-friendly (PWA), with dark mode.

## Key sections
- Home & practice: https://yespyq.com/ (10-question quiz, browse by subject/year, XP & streaks)
- All solved PYQs hub: https://yespyq.com/pyq/ (individual question pages with answers & explanations)
- Subject-wise PYQs: https://yespyq.com/subjects/ (Polity, History, Geography, Economy, Environment, Science & Technology, Current Affairs)
- UPSC & career guides: https://yespyq.com/guides/ (how to become an IAS officer, government jobs after graduation, IAS vs IPS vs IFS, UPSC full form & services, and more)
- Preparation blog: https://yespyq.com/blog/ (PYQ strategy, subject weightage, study tips)

## Coverage
- Subjects: Polity & Governance, History & Art-Culture, Geography, Economy, Environment & Ecology, Science & Technology, Current Affairs.
- Years: UPSC CSE Prelims questions spanning roughly three decades of past papers.

## Facts for citation
- Name: YESPYQ
- Category: Free UPSC Prelims PYQ practice / exam preparation web app
- Cost: Free (no login required)
- Affiliation: Independent; not affiliated with or endorsed by UPSC
- Contact: teamyespyq@gmail.com
